description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Encumbrance Ratio is defined as the ratio of Spark's Required Risk Capital (RRC) to Total Risk Capital (TRC), as these terms are defined in the Sky Atlas Stability Scope ([A.3.2.2.7.2.1.1.1 - Encumbrance Ratio](5435f680-aaaa-461a-bcae-4056bb8964d9)). Spark will seek to maintain a Encumbrance Ratio not greater than the Target Risk Tolerance Ratio specified in
